作為當年選秀的27順位，Siakam擁有的前景自然是比不上身為榜眼的Ingram，但是他擁有的天賦卻還真的不差，2米06的身高，2米22的臂展，之所以掉到27順位除了年齡之外，更多還是因為他的投射、持球都不算好。作為對比，Ingram也是2米06的身高和2米21的臂展，杜克大學出來的他大一賽季已經已經展現了自己的投籃和持球進攻能力，也是因此，Ingram才會在第二順位被湖人選中。儘管兩人的新秀賽季都打得極差，但是情況卻也有些不同。由於湖人當時正在鍛鍊年輕人，新秀賽季的Ingram一共出戰了79場比賽，其中首發出戰40場，場均上場28.8分鐘，絕對可以說得上球隊主力級別，他當時的數據是9.4分4.0籃板，命中率和三分命中率分別為40.2%和29.4%。新秀賽季的Siakam就不一樣了，當時的Siakam只是球隊潛力股，並非即戰力，他只出戰了55場比賽，場均上場15.6分鐘，拿到4.2分3.4籃板，彼時的Siakam還不具備三分能力，他在賽季末的時候被下放到了發展聯盟——這也便是榜眼和首輪末新秀的區別。

James Harden is a Taurus whereas his girlfriend is a Pisces. Last week james asked me if I would like to have lunch at his place. I replied in the affirmative. I ate some snacks beforehand to take the edge of my hunger. We washed two bags of cheese salad and left the cheese salad to dry out before consuming it. In this way the salad contains more nutrients than when you eat it right after opening the bag. We cut the meat into dice, peeled and diced the potatoes and chopped the onions. The inside of the meat is raw whereas the outside is cooked. Onions can be eaten raw or cooked. We were careful because the knife has a razor-sharp edge. After supper I said "I'll wash, you dry" He came to the kitchen and stood beside me, drying up the cutlery and utensils while I washed. Since it's best to dry your clothes out the day before by hanging them on the clothesline, I went ahead and helped him do that. We then joined his sister on a run along the promenade which felt relaxing. I bought a pair of trainers for her who said she would pay me back if I got her those sneakers. Looks like she sold me a bill of goods- and then I bought a Gucci watchband but I'm wondering if this really is genuine. I might have bought a pup. After running I gave her a foot massage and dried her feet on a towel and her brother's quilt lol. On that evening we joined with their parents in doing a thirty thousand piece jigsaw puzzle. It felt thoroughly enjoyable. Since both James and I are Marvel fans, the next day we went to the cinema and joined the queue for the movie tickets for Avengers. His friends joined us in the cinema later. James' cousin Mark is a marketing manager at hilton. I enjoy his company. He uses photoshop every day for poster and banner design since photoshop is worth its weight in gold in digital marketing. The party poster he designed is fabulous. The gold words are clearly defined on the black background. I admire him for his ambition and ruthless determination to succeed. He never gets sidetracked by other people. In addition he enjoys participating in debates. He wiped the floor with all opposition during debate about the existence of god which was pretty impressive. His best friend is his pug. He towels off the dog after its bath. Today dogs certainly don't come cheap including getting it spayed or neutered and any medications they take when they have a condition. Hos elder brother is an estate agent who earns a basic salary of one million four hundred seventy five thousand eight hundred dollars per annum plus a three percent commission every deal he makes so he doesn't work by commission only. Last year his sales didn't satisfy the expectations of the company partly because the economy was hardly blooming. He's a fan of Jacqueline wong. Have you heard of the sex scandal involving her and Andy Hui? Theres no doubt that they were an item. As a result many people think it's time for her to hang up her spurs. In fact her friend alan hung up his spurs several years ago because of a sex scandal. His elder sister is an iphone saleswoman who is paid a weekly wage of four thousand dollars plus a ten percent commission on the sales she makes so her job isn't on commission only. So far her profits have fulfilled her expectation. She said she would go on strike but it turned out that she was joking because her father is an intense patriot. If she had gone on strike her dad wouldn't have been happy about it. Mark's dad is a physics professor who is currently solving a notoriously difficult math question for all he is worth, along with his team. Hopefully they'll find an answer to it. Besides physics he's an avid football fan. His favourite team Barcelona is currently tio of the league whereas Milan is bottom of the league. Madrid is lying second in the league this year. Recently Budapest edged Rome three-two. Budapest edged its rival into third place. The league championship is the opportunity for the best teams in the league to strut their stuff.
